title: avena pratensis subsp. sulcata
intro: Avena pratensis subsp. sulcata, also known as rough meadow oats or grooved oat, is a subspecies of oat grass that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Avena pratensis subsp. sulcata include soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting restful sleep. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and teas, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
